untranslatable_reason: This signal requires fundamental/valuation metrics (P/E ratio, Price-to-Dividend, Price-to-Operating Income, Price-to-Cash Flow, historical growth rates, and Growth Score) that are NOT available in the allowed indicator list. The strategy is a value/glamour factor-based reversion strategy requiring cross-sectional ranking and decile sorting on multiple fundamental dimensions. Only technical price-action and momentum indicators are available in the backtest engine.
translation_notes: SSRN_227016_7 is a fundamental multi-factor ranking strategy that cannot be implemented with technical indicators alone. The rule requires: (1) identification of glamour stocks via high multiples AND high historical growth, (2) identification of value stocks via low multiples AND low growth, (3) long/short portfolio construction via decile ranking. This requires access to earnings data, dividends, operating income, cash flow, and historical growth metrics. Recommend providing P/E, dividend yield, growth rate, and other fundamental indicators to enable translation.
